_meta.label: English
_meta.note: Empty strings fall back to the Dutch HTML. Fill in the English translations and set status to 'volledig'.

hero.badge: 🚲 The only coffee bike that grinds beans by pedal power
hero.title:
Cycling coffee
with a smile
hero.subtitle: On our Velopresso coffee bikes we grind our beans by pedalling and pour cappuccinos, lattes, chai and tea — with lots of passion. The eye-catcher at your event!

about.label: Who are we?
about.title: Smiling Baristas on a Velopresso
about.text1: We are Didi and his Smiling Baristas — and we pedal coffee with a smile. On our coffee bikes we grind our beans by pedalling and pour cappuccinos, lattes, chai and tea, with lots of passion!
about.text2: We bring the atmosphere to your event, are the eye-catcher at your company party and the icebreaker at your trade stand. The Velopresso is the only fully mobile coffee bike where you grind the beans by pedal power.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Tailor-made coffee experiences
services.subtitle: From team building to brand activation — we deliver unforgettable coffee moments for every type of event.
services.svc1text: Our Velopresso coffee bikes bring the atmosphere to your event, company party or trade stand. Fully self-sufficient — we come to you.
services.svc2text: Put your brand in the spotlight with a fully branded Velopresso. Bike decor with your logo, stamped cups and a custom menu card.
services.svc3text: From beginner to artist — learn to steam milk perfectly and pour hearts into a cappuccino that everyone will fall in love with.

products.label: Featured
products.title: Popular products
products.subtitle: Our best-selling coffees, accessories and gift vouchers.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your event and we'll put together a tailor-made proposal.

events.pageSubtitle: The Velopresso rides to your party, fair or company moment — fully self-sufficient.

workshops.pageSubtitle: Learn the secrets of the barista in a hands-on workshop. Ideal as team building, company activity or just for fun!
workshops.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we will contact you.

shop.pageSubtitle: Our products — from freshly roasted beans to workshop gift vouchers — delivered to your door.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.shippingNote: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout.

checkout.title: Complete order
checkout.name: Name
checkout.successMsg: Order placed! We will contact you shortly.
checkout.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us.

contact.pageSubtitle: Do you have a question, want a quote or just want to chat about coffee? Send us a message.

footer.tagline: We bring warmth, smiles and excellent coffee to your event — throughout Belgium.
